data.title: Bitdeer Shares Plummet Amid Financial and Operational Challenges
data.description:
According to PANews, shares of Bitdeer, a Bitcoin mining company led by Wu Jihan, experienced a significant decline of approximately 20% at the opening of the U.S. stock market, currently priced at $11.13 per share. This marks a cumulative drop of about 50% for the week.

The company recently announced plans to privately issue $400 million in convertible bonds due in 2031, alongside a buyback of existing bonds. Additionally, a fire at its new mining facility in Ohio resulted in the collapse of two buildings, although no injuries were reported, the incident has raised concerns in the market.

Further exacerbating the situation, Bitdeer's Q3 financial report revealed losses exceeding expectations, coupled with delays in the delivery of ASIC chips, contributing to increased selling pressure in the market.

data.title: Investor Huang Licheng Increases Ethereum and Uniswap Positions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, investor Huang Licheng has significantly increased his positions in Ethereum (ETH) and Uniswap (UNI). HyperInsight reports that Huang has leveraged a 25-fold increase in his ETH position, valued at $21.26 million, with an opening price of $3,475.8 and a liquidation price of $3,138.9. Additionally, Huang has expanded his UNI position tenfold, valued at $700,000, with an opening price of $8.33414.

data.title: Dutch delegates to travel to China to solve Nexperia issues
data.description:
The Dutch Ministry of Economic Affairs has sent a delegation to China in response to the request from the Chinese government.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dutch-delegates-to-travel-nexperia/

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari Highlights Concerns Over Inflation Rate
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has expressed concerns that the current inflation rate of 3% remains excessively high. The economy is presenting mixed signals, with certain sectors of the labor market experiencing pressure.

data.title: Citigroup: Continued weakness in labor market data will prompt the Fed to cut interest rates in December, January, and March.
data.description: Citigroup economists noted that despite warnings from the White House, October's CPI and employment data are still likely to be released in the coming days. The government shutdown disrupted data collection, but Citigroup stated that statistical agencies can ask retrospective questions in the household employment survey and use more estimation methods in inflation indicators. However, the October CPI data may be "less accurate than usual." Citigroup economists expect continued weakness in labor market data, which will prompt the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates in December, January, and March. (Jinshi)

data.title: Brother Machi continues to add to his long positions in ETH and UNI, now holding positions worth approximately $22 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analytics platform Lookonchain, Huang Licheng (aka "Machi Dage") deposited 2.44 million USDC into HyperLiquid in the past 8 hours, continuing to increase his long positions in ETH and UNI. His current holdings include 6,275.7 ETH (worth approximately $21.3 million) and 88,888.8 UNI (worth approximately $705,000).

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari: 3% inflation rate is still too high, and the economy is sending mixed signals.
data.description: Federal Reserve Bank of New York's Neel Kashkari stated that an inflation rate of 3% is still too high. The economy is sending mixed signals, with some sectors of the labor market facing pressure. (Golden Ten)

data.title: dYdX Foundation Allocates 75% of Protocol Revenue for Token Buyback
data.description: According to Foresight News, the dYdX Foundation has announced that the dYdX community has approved a proposal to allocate 75% of protocol revenue for the buyback of DYDX tokens. Starting today, this portion of the protocol fees will be used to repurchase DYDX on the open market.

data.title: A whale deposited 52.5 million BANK tokens into a CEX an hour ago, worth $3.36 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale deposited 52.5 million BANK tokens into Bitget one hour ago, worth $3.36 million.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Long-term Bitcoin holders sold 815,000 BTC in the past 30 days.
data.description: CryptoQuant published an article on its X platform stating that long-term Bitcoin holders are accelerating their sell-off of BTC, with approximately 815,000 BTC sold in the past 30 days, a new high since January 2024. As demand contracts, this selling pressure is putting downward pressure on prices.

data.title: The dYdX community voted to increase the protocol fee buyback ratio to 75%.
data.description: Decentralized exchange dYdX announced on its X platform that, based on community voting results, it will increase the percentage of protocol fees used for buying back $DYDX tokens from 25% to 75%. This policy is effective today, meaning that 75% of the fees collected by the protocol will be directly used to buy back DYDX tokens on the open market.

data.title: Ethereum Leaders Launch ‘Trustless Manifesto’ to Protect Crypto Decentralization
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin and prominent developers released the Trustless Manifesto establishing strict decentralization criteria, following former developer revelations that five to ten insiders control protocol direction through funding and attention allocation.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethereum-leaders-launch-trustless-manifesto-to-protect-crypto-decentralization/

data.title: Investment app Public acquires Alto's crypto business for $65 million.
data.description: Investment app Public has acquired the cryptocurrency business of cryptocurrency IRA provider Alto for $65 million in cash and stock. Public will reportedly fully integrate Alto's cryptocurrency accounts by 2026, while Alto will continue to operate as a service provider. Alto will also continue to operate its other businesses independently, including private lending and venture capital investments. (Fortune)

data.title: Government Removing Barriers for Bitcoin and Crypto: US Treasury Secretary
data.description:
American Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has stated that the government is looking to remove regulatory barriers hampering the adoption of Bitcoin.
source: https://zycrypto.com/government-removing-barriers-for-bitcoin-and-crypto-us-treasury-secretary/

data.title: Uniswap Achieves Record Monthly Trading Volume in October 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Uniswap recorded its highest-ever monthly trading volume in October 2025, reaching approximately $116.6 billion. This marks a new milestone for the platform since its inception, as reported by Token Terminal data.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Experiences Decline Amid Tech Sector Developments
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. stock market opened with declines on November 13, 2025. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.28%, the S&P 500 index decreased by 0.44%, and the Nasdaq Composite dropped by 0.67%. In the tech sector, Alibaba saw a rise of 3.75% as it prepares a significant overhaul of its AI applications to compete directly with ChatGPT. JD.com experienced a modest increase of 0.13% following its third-quarter revenue surpassing expectations. Cisco shares surged by 6.8% after the company raised its full-year profit and revenue forecasts.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Bitcoin's market capitalization will surpass that of gold by 2035
data.description: In an interview, Strategy founder Michael Saylor stated that Bitcoin's market capitalization will surpass that of gold by 2035. He said, "I have no doubt that by 2035, Bitcoin will become a larger asset class than gold." (Watcher Guru)
